subcodes.title: Lesson given to I. D. Brittingham, Apr. 1909
subcodes.first_line: The events mentioned in the first part of chapter 16 of Revelation happened before the coming of the Manifestation. The seven angels signify seven Powers
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @predictions and prophecies, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @prophecy and fulfillment, @war and peace, @rejection, opposition and persecution
